name: Hummous
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the garlic cloves in the feed tube of a food processor fitted with a steel blade and process until pureed.
2. Add the garbanzo beans (including the reserved liquid) to the food processor and pulse to combine with the garlic.
3. Add the tahini, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to the food processor. Pulse until well combined and smooth.
4. Slowly drizzle in the reserved garbanzo bean liquid while continuing to pulse until the hummus reaches the desired consistency.
5. Transfer the hummus to a bowl or flat dish.
6. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with paprika.
7. Serve with pita bread or crackers.
8. Store refrigerated for up to 2 weeks.
